title: Scan State
description: Tracks which scan dimensions are clean vs need re-scan across iterations, enabling incremental workflow continuation.

iteration.description: Which scan iteration this state represents (1 = first run, N = N-th continuation)

workflowId.description: The CC workflow ID (e.g. wf_d93815ef-cfe) this state was parsed from

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this state was generated

totalAgents.description: Total number of agent tasks launched in this iteration

completed.description: Number of agents that returned a result (type: 'result' found in journal)

hung.description: Number of agents that were launched but never returned (started minus completed)

passCount.description: Number of completed agents with verdict PASS

partialCount.description: Number of completed agents with verdict PARTIAL

failCount.description: Number of completed agents with verdict FAIL

criticalIssues.description: Total CRITICAL severity issues across all completed agents

highIssues.description: Total HIGH severity issues across all completed agents

mediumIssues.description: Total MEDIUM severity issues across all completed agents

lowIssues.description: Total LOW severity issues across all completed agents

dimensions.description: Per-dimension scan results — one entry per agent task (key)

key.description: The v2 hash key from journal.jsonl that identifies this agent task

agentId.description: The CC agent ID (e.g. a3badee85e3e20804) that executed this task

label.description: Human-readable dimension label extracted from agent prompt (e.g. usability-1, logic-2)

verdict.description: Agent's verdict if status is completed

iterDetected.description: Which iteration first detected these issues

iterResolved.description: Which iteration resolved this dimension (null if still pending)

scanned_files.description: Source file paths actually scanned by this dimension agent (used for self-check #15 rotation verification)

completedKeys.description: Keys of dimensions that completed successfully (carried forward to next iteration)

retryKeys.description: Keys of dimensions that need re-running in next iteration (hung/failed)

parentIteration.description: Which iteration this scan state continues from (null if first iteration)

retryReason.description: Map of key -> reason string for each retry dimension
